name: Ashley Pinto
bio: Error 404: Free time missing, Organizer.exe still running.

readme.title: Hi, I'm Ashley Pinto! 👋
readme.description: I'm a final year CSE student and GDG Organizer at St Joseph Engineering College, Mangalore. Passionate about community building, technology, and organizing high-impact events. I love bringing developers together to learn, share, and build cool projects.

pinned.description: The official website for Google Developer Groups on Campus SJEC.

name: Santhsim Dsouza
bio: I treat production like a 5-hour contest, one wrong submission and chaos begins.

readme.title: Hi, I'm Santhsim! 👋
readme.description: Co-Lead at GDG SJEC. I am a competitive programmer, algorithm enthusiast, and software developer. I enjoy writing clean, optimized code and solving complex algorithmic challenges. Let's build the future together!

pinned.name: competitive-programming

name: Reuben A Vinod
bio: I always prefer dark mode, because light attracts bugs. Pun intended

readme.title: Hi, I'm Reuben! 👋
readme.description: Web Lead at GDG SJEC. Full-stack developer with a passion for beautiful, accessible, and high-performance web applications. I love CSS, Vite, Astro, and React. Always coding in dark mode.

pinned.name: custom-portfolio
pinned.description: A dark-themed portfolio website showcasing my works and articles, built with Astro.

name: Jeethan Roche
bio: If the app didn't crash so far, then it is the silence before the storm of bugs

readme.title: Hello, I'm Jeethan Roche! 👋
readme.description:
I'm a Computer Science Engineering undergrad with a keen interest in Data Science, currently studying at St. Joseph Engineering College, Mangalore. My journey in technology is fueled by my love in exploring new concepts and having a foundational setup in Mathematics, Statistical Concepts.

Beyond academics, I am the member in The Sceptix Club, our college's coding club, where I collaborate with like-minded peers to explore and create innovative projects. I believe in continuous learning and the power of technology to make a meaningful impact.

In addition to my technical pursuits, I have a creative side that's expressed through my small YouTube channel, which I started in 2020, but currently on hold.

pinned.name: Sceptix-App
pinned.description: A cross-platform mobile application for Sceptix Club announcements and challenges.

name: Dion Lobo
bio: I prefer the cloud, because when it crashes, at least it takes everyone down with me

readme.title: Hi, I'm Dion! 👋
readme.description: Cloud Lead at GDG SJEC. Enthusiastic about DevOps, Cloud Computing (Google Cloud, AWS), Kubernetes, Docker, and infrastructure as code. I like breaking and fixing deployments.

pinned.name: gcp-deployment-pipelines
pinned.description: CI/CD pipelines automation templates using GitHub Actions for deploying Node.js apps on GCP Cloud Run.

bio: Training models and minds, both need patience and good data.

pinned.name: vision-assistant
